children.heading: .—Federal Charter
children.label: a .—Federal Charter
children.text: Military Order of the World Wars (in this chapter, the “corporation”), a nonprofit corporation incorporated in the District of Columbia, is a federally chartered corporation.
its bylaws or articles of incorporation;
the laws of the District of Columbia that apply to corporations such as the corporation recognized under this chapter.
